source: Our World in Data grapher, using WHO/UNICEF estimates
indicator: HPV Vaccination coverage by age 15, last dose, females
license: CC BY 4.0 unless otherwise stated by the source
preprocessing: Selected the Australia rows for 2020-2024 and retained the published whole-percent values; no interpolation or imputation was applied.
limitations: Coverage is an implementation uptake proxy, not adherence, effectiveness, or causal impact.
The snapshot covers one country and is illustrative rather than representative of all implementation contexts.
This snapshot is evidence for the experimental contract only and does not support a stable promotion claim.
